justifications.clarity: Retrospective context box orients the reader before the survey; three deployment patterns defined with precise set notation; DAG workflow definition flows naturally into three concrete examples; fairness criteria use parallel mathematical structure.
justifications.rigor: Fairness impossibility proposition formally stated and correctly attributed to Chouldechova (2017); RRF formula correct with k=60; five open research problems reference concrete recent work (Chen et al. 2024, Didisheim & Lopez-Lira 2025); SR 11-7 documentation checklist accurate and detailed; minor deduction for feedback loop bias lacking formal notation.
justifications.completeness: All eight learning objectives addressed; all six sections contain substantive content including code listings; survey covers portfolio management, compliance, insurance, and trading; five open research problems all named with references; minor gap: calibration accuracy not cross-linked to Brier score or reliability diagrams from Chapter 6.
justifications.pedagogy: Eight learning objectives mapped at the outset; each section opens with a motivating context paragraph before definitions; difficulty builds from survey through implementation to governance to frontier; for-academic-researcher / for-practitioner closing structure provides actionable synthesis; deployment-pattern and architecture-family tables are directly usable decision tools.
justifications.style: Natural expert prose throughout; final reproducibility remark closes the book well; no paragraph headings; notation consistent; Soros reflexivity analogy for feedback loops is well-integrated rather than decorative.
